architecture/index.mdx.scope: Architecture and role context for the SDK client and server implementations.

basic/authorization/authorization-server.scope: Client-side protected-resource and authorization-server discovery; implementing an authorization server is outside SDK scope.

basic/authorization/client-registration..scope: Client registration and client metadata consumption; authorization-server implementation is outside SDK scope.

basic/authorization/index.mdx.scope: MCP authorization client behavior and authenticated Streamable HTTP integration.

basic/authorization/security-considerati.scope: Authorization client validation and server-side HTTP deployment protections applicable to the SDK.

basic/index.mdx.scope: Core JSON-RPC, stateless request metadata, result, error, and JSON Schema rules.

basic/patterns/cancellation.mdx.scope: Core request and subscription cancellation semantics across transports.

basic/patterns/index.mdx.scope: Core request-response, multi-round-trip, and subscribe-notify pattern overview.

basic/patterns/mrtr.mdx.scope: Core multi-round-trip input_required request and retry behavior.

basic/patterns/progress.mdx.scope: Request-scoped progress token parsing, routing, and monotonic progress behavior.

basic/patterns/subscriptions.mdx.scope: Core subscriptions/listen filters, per-subscription acknowledgment ordering, correlation, cancellation, and graceful close.

basic/transports/index.mdx.scope: Transport requirements shared by stdio and Streamable HTTP.

basic/transports/stdio.mdx.scope: Stdio framing, process lifecycle, discovery probing, and legacy fallback.

basic/transports/streamable-http.mdx.scope: Modern stateless and legacy stateful Streamable HTTP wire behavior, routing headers, security, streaming, and fallback.

basic/versioning.mdx.scope: Modern version discovery and retry plus dual-era negotiation and legacy initialization fallback.

changelog.mdx.scope: Authoritative 2025-to-2026 change inventory used to audit the SDK release delta.

client/elicitation.mdx.scope: Client elicitation handlers and 2026 MRTR form and URL wire shapes.

client/roots.mdx.scope: Deprecated but supported roots client capability and MRTR roots/list input handling.

client/sampling.mdx.scope: Deprecated but supported sampling client capability and MRTR sampling/createMessage input handling.

deprecated.mdx.scope: Deprecated feature compatibility and the modern profile's removed-method boundaries.

index.mdx.scope: Specification landing page and declared core client-server role boundary.

schema.mdx.scope: Authoritative generated wire schema and its official machine-readable examples.

server/discover.mdx.scope: Required server/discover request, result, cache metadata, and capability advertisement.

server/index.mdx.scope: Server feature overview for prompts, resources, and tools.

server/prompts.mdx.scope: Prompt listing, retrieval, arguments, content, cache metadata, and list-change delivery.

server/resources.mdx.scope: Resource and template listing, reads, errors, cache metadata, and subscription-delivered changes.

server/tools.mdx.scope: Tool listing and invocation, JSON Schema 2020-12, structured output, deterministic ordering, headers, and MRTR.

server/utilities/caching.mdx.scope: Cacheable result ttlMs and cacheScope validation and defaulting.

server/utilities/completion.mdx.scope: Completion capability, request, result, reference, argument, and pagination-limit behavior.

server/utilities/logging.mdx.scope: Deprecated request-scoped logging metadata and notification behavior retained by the modern profile.

server/utilities/pagination.mdx.scope: Cursor request and nextCursor result behavior for paginated core list methods.
